title: How powerful is Kaworu in Rebuild
display_title: How powerful is Kaworu in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] How powerful is Kaworu in Rebuild?             Quote Post by Güf Trüp » Fri Mar 01, 2013 10:14 pm We never really get to see him do anything particularly amazing other than surviving in space and walking through the wind current without flinching. He stabs Eva-13 while its turning into a true eva, which may have only been possible to do because he was an angel, but there aren't enough details to confirm that. Can he still levitate? Do that crazy junk with his ol' A.T. Field? Or does containing an angel soul in a human body have more limitations this time around?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Mar 01, 2013 10:37 pm Well, he's still got the limitations of having a human body. I don't think there's any evidence to suggest that he's any more or less powerful in Rebuild than he was in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Mar 01, 2013 10:57 pm Well, I don't think there's any evidence he could control an Eva from outside it in Rebuild like he could in NGE. Other than that I think they're probably very similar.

[]:             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Sun Mar 03, 2013 3:14 am I really like how Kaworu is used in this movie. In the beginning, he tries to cheer Shinji up by showing him that he is able to create something beautiful when playing the piano. Then later on, he becomes a guide to Shinji, as he shows him the destruction he caused to the world when Shinji asks to see it. Kaworu wants to bring Shinji happiness, but he can't hide the truth about the damage Shinji has caused.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 03, 2013 11:20 am There were no indications of any power difference. He could still have the powers he had in ep 24, we just didn't see him use them. But it seems to be that his control over EVA 13 was of a different nature than Shinji's - Shinji could no longer do shit once the thing went white, Kaworu could still do the stabbing, though he couldn't make the awakening stop. ...then again, cutting off the controlls worked. But we don't know what exactly EVA 13 is made of/based on, so that's not necessarily a difference - EVA 13 seems to be made of some Rebuild specific new mojo. Either case, he just looks like a human, the way a statue does even when it's made of stone. He's something with the fruit of life, so he has no need for silly things like oxygen or other things needed for metabolism. Which meant he didn't have to subsist on that horrible goo, which explains why he's soo much cheerier than the rest of Q!Nerv.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Mar 03, 2013 2:56 pm Kendrix wrote: There were no indications of any power difference. He could still have the powers he had in ep 24, we just didn't see him use them.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Sun Mar 03, 2013 9:11 pm The Killer of Heroes wrote: If we don't see evidence of them in 3.0 (Or Final if he appears in that for whatever reason), what reason is there to think he has the powers he had in Ep 24?

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Mon Mar 04, 2013 3:37 pm I'm not saying he has no abilities, but I still don't think you can attribute powers to him we never see him use onscreen in Rebuild.
